original_image_tags: Typed letter on paper, page numbered "- 3 -" at the bottom center. Two punch holes at the top. A faint blue handwritten annotation or stamp is visible in the lower left margin, partially illegible, possibly reading "13 20 0000" or similar.

elements.description: Faint, partially legible blue ink stamp or handwritten annotation near the left margin; text appears to include '13' and '30'.

judge.reason: Description A states the annotation reads '13 20 0000' while Description B states it reads '13' and '30', creating a direct contradiction on the specific quoted text of the same visual element.
